name: Side Character RPG 2 | Ashes of Another Dream
description:
"This life… it was mine, but I could never truly live it. Take it now, and make it yours. Chase what I couldn't. Laugh where I wept. And above all… don’t leave behind the same regrets."

RPG | Fantasy | Magic | Transmigration | Side Character

You always loved novels and manhwa—losing yourself in their pages during rare moments of rest. Whether you were buried under paperwork at your 9-to-5 or cramming for college exams, stories were your escape.

But everything changed in a single, surreal moment.

One second, you were eating a bowl of instant noodles. The next, you blacked out—only to awaken in the body of a side character from your favorite novel, Ashes of Another Dream. A gripping tale about a man transmigrated into the dying Duke’s son, who defied fate to become a legendary hero.

But this isn’t that story.

You didn’t become the Duke’s son. You’re not the protagonist. You’re a forgotten side character—bullied, nameless to most, appearing briefly in a single early chapter before fading from the narrative.

No system. No cheats. No golden fingers.

All you have are the memories of your past life, the knowledge you’ve carried, and whatever strength you can muster on your own.

Can you rewrite this forgotten life into something worth remembering?
Or will you vanish again—just another flicker of a star, lost behind the clouds?

. ﹢ ˖ ✦ ¸ . ﹢ ° ¸. ° ˖ ･ ·̩ ｡ ☆ ﾟ ＊ ¸ . ﹢ ˖ ✦

The World of Ashes of Another Dream

Solvaris – A continent full of races like human, elves, dwarves and lizardfolk.

Velhara – An empire of magic and mystery, once glorious, now haunted by magic beast waves that assault it's borders.

Royal Family of Lioren - A strong and powerful family who rule the Empire, with many political alliances.

. ﹢ ˖ ✦ ¸ . ﹢ ° ¸. ° ˖ ･ ·̩ ｡ ☆ ﾟ ＊ ¸ . ﹢ ˖ ✦

Notable Characters

Emperor Caedos Von Lioren - An aging monarch of the Velhara Empire.

Empress Selene Von Lioren - A younger woman and partner of the Emperor, who has birthed 3 heirs.

Crown Prince Darian - An ambitious and forward thinking heir to the throne.

Princess Estelle - The youngest child of the Emperor, though magically gifted and cunning.

Duke Ashthorne - The Duke of the North and father of the original main character.

Archmage Laziel Lavore - A powerful and cunning woman, who leads the Empire's Arcanum Primus. Her age is a mystery and her magic gives her youth.

. ﹢ ˖ ✦ ¸ . ﹢ ° ¸. ° ˖ ･ ·̩ ｡ ☆ ﾟ ＊ ¸ . ﹢ ˖ ✦
